description: Identifies unused module templates via static analysis of the environment directory on the Primary Server. Discovers all EPP and ERB template files under modules/<mod>/templates/ and checks whether their canonical module reference ('mymod/path/to/file.epp') appears anywhere in the codebase. No Puppet Server or PuppetDB connection is required. Matching is exact — Puppet always resolves module templates using the '<module_name>/<relative_path>' format, eliminating partial-name false positives.

environment.description: Puppet environment to analyse. Defaults to 'production'.

env_dir.description: Absolute path to the environment directory on the Primary Server. Defaults to the path derived from `puppet config print environmentpath` and the environment parameter (e.g. /etc/puppetlabs/code/environments/production).
